name: deepflow-weather
description: Accelerate weather simulation using flow-matching based foundation models
paperTitle: DeepFlow v2 - Flow-Matching Foundation Model for Weather Simulations
content:
## DeepFlow v2

### Core Concept

Accelerate weather simulation using flow-matching based foundation models

### Implementation

Key implementation aspects:
1. Data preparation and preprocessing
2. Model architecture design
3. Training procedure
4. Evaluation and validation

This skill enables Accelerate weather simulation using flow-matching based foundation models.

### When to Use

- Problem domain matches technique scope
- Required computational resources available
- Evaluation criteria well-defined

### When NOT to Use

- Limited data availability
- Tight latency requirements
- Domain significantly different
